mano_cua.result_summary: Headscale Web UI无法连接后端API服务器（无Headscale 25+后端运行），用户管理页面显示API连接失败错误，用户列表为空，无法测试预认证密钥的获取/创建/过期操作。另发现Version显示为placeholder insert-version、密码眼睛图标切换不影响实际显示等UI问题。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: I'm on the User View page (localhost:8080/web/users.html) and it shows the same errors as before: 1. Popup: 'The server is configured with a public base URL of /web - did you mean to visit /web/api/v1/user instead?' 2. Error: 'Headscale might be down or API settings may need to be set change server settings in the settings page'. The page is completely empty - no users are listed. There's no user list, no user cards, no 'Add User' button - nothing functional on this page due to the API failure. Based on all my testing, the target features (pre-auth key list, create pre-auth key, expire pre-auth key) cannot be accessed or tested because the Headscale web UI cannot connect to the Headscale API server.
